description_long: This object consists of three distinct residential houses arranged side by side, each with its own small yard or garden area. The houses are two stories tall, featuring a mix of flat and gable roofs, and are separated by green lawns with trees, shrubs, and outdoor furniture. The facades display a variety of window sizes and placements, with some houses having balconies or rooftop terraces. Entryways are marked by colored doors, and the exteriors are finished in neutral tones with occasional brick or siding textures. The overall layout suggests a suburban or urban neighborhood setting, with each house having its own unique architectural details.
description: A group of three two-story houses with individual yards, varied roof styles, and distinct entryways, set in a suburban neighborhood layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facades, colored doors, and landscaped yards with trees and outdoor furniture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the houses, window placements, and the separation between each unit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying backyards, additional windows, and the open garden spaces between the houses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing balconies, rooftop terraces, and the rear architectural features of the houses.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entryways with colored doors, minimal steps, and no prominent porches or overhangs
